label: About
title: About Spring Fever Marbling Chambers
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 22 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Air / Earth, by Celia Hollander and Morgan Fisher - Flower Music (1998), plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Spring Fever Marbling Chambers: Create a single abstract still image built around two large overlapping circular chambers centered on a wide matte field of sun-heated red-orange. Keep the outer page open and poster-flat, with substantial breathing room, while the interiors of the circles hold dense blue-green marbling, clouded white eddies, minera... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against overlapping twin marbled basins at center, large pale inner plate inside left basin, and cool crescent inset inside right basin.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
